expectations.text: Explicitly identifies the N+1 problem as the cause
Explains that the loop produces roughly one query per item (order of N+1 round trips)
expectations.evidence: 1 + 200 + 200 = 401 round trips for a page of 200

expectations.text: Recommends loading related rows in a single/batched query (IN / ANY / eager load) instead of per-item
expectations.evidence: Option A: In(ids) batched + stitch -> 3 queries; Option B relations

expectations.text: States a tradeoff or caveat for the recommended fix
expectations.evidence: Tradeoff: app-side stitching maps; Option B trusts ORM strategy, must verify SQL
